calendarPicker.hint: Your calendars stay updated automatically. Choose which ones Braintunnel shows first in your schedule and when you chat about your calendar. Changes save as soon as you toggle a calendar.
calendarPicker.empty: No calendars found yet. Try refreshing once your calendar account has connected.

wikiActivity.heading: Wiki activity
wikiActivity.description: Peek at pages the background job touched recently-or open the full log to see each step.

hubAddFoldersPanel.placeholder: Reply to confirm which folders to add, adjust the list, or say no…
hubAddFoldersPanel.kickoffMessage: /files Look through my Desktop and Documents folders for folders that would be good additions to my search index. Weed out poor fits (e.g. huge image-only archives, games, temp dirs). Recommend at most 5 candidates. Present them as a numbered list (1-5) so I can reply by number (e.g. "add 1, 3, and 4"). For each item, say what would be indexed: unless I should exclude certain file types or subdirectories, assume the whole tree under that folder path, including all subdirectories. If only part of a folder should be indexed (specific subdirs, or skip certain extensions), say that explicitly. When done, ask which numbers to add and wait for my confirmation before changing any indexing settings.

lead.afterWikiStrongBeforeVaultStrong: is a private set of Markdown pages in
lead.afterVaultStrongBeforeEmphasis: , stored with your account. Braintunnel keeps it growing and tidy automatically-so answers stay grounded in
lead.afterEmphasis: world, not a generic model guess.

howAutomaticUpdates.afterYourWikiStrong: background worker runs on its own schedule. Each time it wakes up it does two things:
howAutomaticUpdates.enrichingDescriptionBeforeWikilinks: - adds and deepens pages (people, projects, interests) from your mail, profile, and public sources. Pages are cross-linked with
howAutomaticUpdates.cleaningUpDescription: - fixes broken links, checks orphan pages, and updates the index so navigation stays coherent.
howAutomaticUpdates.whenFreshBeforeUpdateStrong: When everything looks fresh, Braintunnel backs off until there's new mail-or you tap

sourcesVsWiki.beforeSynthesizedKnowledgeBaseStrong: Raw material lives in the things you connect: email, documents and folders, calendar, and (when available) Messages. Braintunnel searches those directly. The wiki is different - it is your
sourcesVsWiki.afterSynthesizedKnowledgeBaseStrong: : names, projects, and context compiled into readable pages. Over time it becomes richer and more accurate without duplicating every raw message.

control.vaultDescription: Your vault is protected by the password you set at setup-you unlock it when you use Braintunnel.
control.pauseResumeDescription: Pause anytime from Activity or the wiki detail pane. Resume always starts the next scheduled pass cleanly.
control.editYourselfDescription: Open pages from hub or chat. The loop picks up your edits and works around them.
control.moveAroundQuicklyAfterAt: to open it from chat, or search when you know the name but not the path.

hubWikiAboutPanel.footer: Think of the wiki as the map of what matters to you: the distilled picture Braintunnel uses alongside live search so help stays personal, consistent, and yours.

wiki.title: Your wiki
wiki.updateNowTitle: Run a background wiki refresh now

sources.title: Connected sources
sources.noneYet: None yet - add mail or calendars so search and your wiki have material to work with.

hubBrainAccessSummary.title: Brain to Brain
hubBrainAccessSummary.description: Choose who can ask your brain and what each collaborator may learn - policies, audit-style activity, and revokes live in Settings.
hubBrainAccessSummary.manageSubtitle: Full-screen policies, collaborators, and inbound activity

hubBackgroundAgentsDetail.lead: Wiki expansion fills and updates your vault using your profile, indexed mail, optional Messages (when available), and public web research when that improves accuracy. Use a full pass for a broad overview or a continue pass to deepen or fix gaps after mail syncs.
hubBackgroundAgentsDetail.runInProgressHint: A run is already in progress - you can follow it in the activity log below. When it finishes, you can start another pass.

empty.noneInProgress: No wiki expansion run in progress. Start a full or continue pass above when you want another pass.
empty.noneYet: No wiki expansion runs yet. Start a full pass above after onboarding or when you want a fresh overview.
